ci_commands_found: ruff check (from Makefile style target and GitHub workflow pr-repo-consistency-bot.yml)
python setup.py deps_table_update (from Makefile fix-repo/check-repo targets - skipped)
make style / make check-code-quality (full style checking from Makefile)
tests_added: test_ruff_check - runs ruff check on setup.py and dependency_versions_table.py
test_ruff_format - runs ruff format --check on setup.py and dependency_versions_table.py
p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 2 pass_to_pass tests (test_ruff_check, test_ruff_format) that verify the repo's own CI linting/formatting rules pass on the base commit. These tests run the same ruff commands used in the transformers CI pipeline (via .github/workflows/pr-repo-consistency-bot.yml and Makefile). Verified working on 2026-04-09: all 3 p2p tests pass on base commit. Skipped full ruff check on entire repo due to 79 pre-existing errors. Skipped setup.py deps_table_update as a test since it only updates on Python 3.10.x and returns a non-error exit code even when not updating. The ruff tests cover the modified files mentioned in the fail_to_pass tests.
